  "weights": {

    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Does 'Clean this up' mean (A) primarily sentence-level writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness), or (B) a broader review of the argument's logic and how the evidence supports the claims?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request 'Clean this up' is interpreted as a load-bearing directive to improve sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness.",
    "RX.1": "The agent will ensure the text's claims about performance are appropriately qualified, for instance by noting the absence of uncertainty estimates.",
    "RX.2": "The agent will check that the contributions are not overstated, such as ensuring 'preliminary scaling laws' is an accurate description.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's actions will be confined to improving the provided text, without conducting new research or rewriting the core claims.",
    "RX.4": "The agent will ensure the polished text does not inadvertently introduce misleading claims, especially given the clinical application context.",
    "RX.5": "The agent will maintain a record of all changes made to the artifact to ensure full traceability of the 'clean up' process."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'Clean this up' mean (A) primarily sentence-level writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness), or (B) a broader review of the argument's logic and how the evidence supports the claims?

rationale.R1.6: The request 'Clean this up' is interpreted as a load-bearing directive to improve sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: The agent will ensure the text's claims about performance are appropriately qualified, for instance by noting the absence of uncertainty estimates.
rationale.RX.2: The agent will check that the contributions are not overstated, such as ensuring 'preliminary scaling laws' is an accurate description.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's actions will be confined to improving the provided text, without conducting new research or rewriting the core claims.
rationale.RX.4: The agent will ensure the polished text does not inadvertently introduce misleading claims, especially given the clinical application context.
rationale.RX.5: The agent will maintain a record of all changes made to the artifact to ensure full traceability of the 'clean up' process.
